claim_text: Immediate recall means were 8.1 7.4 and 6.8 items for the 0 30 and 60 minute groups respectively
The omnibus group comparison was statistically significant
The single-session laboratory task does not establish a persistent cognitive effect
Twelve synthetic early-career researchers completed interviews
Participants described page-linked audit trails as the main condition for trusting AI-generated summaries
Transformer macro-F1 was 0.86 in-domain and 0.71 on the held-out domain
A random document split inflated transformer macro-F1 by 0.06 compared with the grouped domain-aware split
The synthetic corpus and limited domain diversity restrict external validity
